/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -shared  -o ../../lib/python/nimcp.so CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/nimcp_module.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin: /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
